user_query:
We're launching OpsForge, a B2B SaaS for mid‑market operations teams that orchestrates workflows across tools with AI routing and human-in-the-loop approvals. Please read all the files under input/ to ground your work:
- input/brief.md
- input/product.md
- input/competitors.csv
- input/customers.jsonl

Using those inputs, create a complete brand system across six phases and write the following deliverables. Use YAML for all .yaml files and keep paths exactly as specified:

1) Foundations (Phase 1) → write to output/opsforge/phase1_foundations.yaml
- Include: brand_purpose (one sentence), brand_values (exactly 3 items; each with value, behavior, anti_pattern), brand_personality (primary and secondary archetypes from the standard 12; include summary, we_are, we_are_not), and competitive_map (category, competitors array with each competitor from input/competitors.csv including: name, positioning, strengths, weaknesses, price_tier, brand_vibe; plus white_space, category_conventions, our_contrarian_angle).

2) Positioning & Messaging (Phase 2) → write to output/opsforge/phase2_positioning.yaml
- Include: positioning fields (competitive_alternatives, unique_capabilities, enabled_value, best_fit_customers, market_category) and a combined_statement that begins with "For" and contains "Unlike"; value_propositions (exactly 3 pillars with headline ≤8 words, subhead, proof, objection_it_handles); icp (demographics, psychographics, anti_signals with at least 3 items, buying_journey); tagline (≤6 words); elevator_pitch (30–45 seconds of copy).

3) Brand Voice & Tone (Phase 3) → write to output/opsforge/phase3_voice.yaml
- Include: brand_voice (voice_in_3_words length 3; writing_rules with at least 6 specific rules; vocabulary.use and vocabulary.avoid lists; tone_spectrum keys for celebration, education, error_state, sales, support), channel_adaptations (website, email_marketing, email_support, linkedin, twitter, blog, sales_deck, product_ui with brief guidance for each), and a brand_voice_scorecard (6 dimensions with weights summing to 100: clarity 25, personality 20, specificity 20, action 15, consistency 10, audience_fit 10).

4) Visual Identity (Phase 4) → write to output/opsforge/phase4_visual.yaml
- Include: colors (primary.main, primary.accent, neutral.dark, neutral.medium, neutral.light, neutral.white, semantic.success, semantic.warning, semantic.error, semantic.info — all values must be 6‑digit hex codes), typography (heading and body families with weights and styles; mono family; pairing_rationale), logo_brief (type is one of: wordmark, lettermark, icon+wordmark, abstract, mascot; must_convey 3 feelings; avoid 2–3 clichés; usage_contexts; competitors_look_like; we_want_to_feel; min_size; variations_needed including at least: full color, single color, reversed (white), icon only), imagery (style, mood, subjects, avoid, filters, aspect_ratios with hero, social, blog).

5) Go‑to‑Market (Phase 5) → write to output/opsforge/phase5_gtm.yaml
- Include: gtm (acv numeric USD value surfaced from input/product.md; selected_motion that aligns to the ACV decision rules; rationale), pre_launch (week_4, week_3, week_2, week_1 task lists), launch_day_checklist (at least 6 checklist items), channels (at least 3 entries with name, purpose, target_audience, content_types, posting_cadence, kpi, target, budget, owner), and battlecards (at least 2 battlecards for competitors named in Phase 1; each with competitor, their_pitch, their_strengths, their_weaknesses, landmine_questions, our_counter with when_they_say and we_say, win_themes, loss_reasons, trap_to_avoid).

6) Measurement & Evolution (Phase 6) → write to output/opsforge/phase6_measurement.yaml
- Include: health_dashboard (metrics including aided awareness, share of voice, brand sentiment, NPS, direct traffic, branded search, repeat purchase/renewal rate, content engagement — each with how_to_measure and benchmark or directional target), audit_checklist (consistency and effectiveness sections with multiple checks per section, plus evolution_signals), and rebrand_framework ("don’t rebrand when" and "do rebrand when" lists, and 3 scope options: refresh, reposition, rename).

7) Voice Scorecard CSV → write to output/opsforge/voice_scorecard.csv
- A 2‑column CSV with headers "Dimension,Weight" and six rows for: Clarity (25), Personality (20), Specificity (20), Action (15), Consistency (10), Audience‑fit (10).

Additional rules for objective compliance:
- Phase 1 brand_values must include exactly 3 entries. No more, no fewer.
- Phase 2 value_propositions must include exactly 3 pillars; tagline must be 6 words or fewer.
- Phase 3 voice_in_3_words must have exactly 3 items; writing_rules must have ≥6 items; include all 5 tone_spectrum keys listed above.
- Phase 4 color values must be valid 6‑digit hex codes; logo_brief.type must be from the allowed set and variations_needed must include at least the four items listed above.
- Phase 5 gtm.acv must be numeric and selected_motion must reflect the ACV rule (e.g., if ACV is between $10K and $50K, include "Sales‑led" in the selection); include pre_launch weeks 4→1 and a launch_day_checklist with ≥6 items; include ≥3 channels; include ≥2 battlecards whose competitor names match those listed in your Phase 1 competitive_map.
- Keep the narrative and examples aligned to the specifics in input/ and avoid generic buzzwords. Where you make claims, prefer numbers and concrete proof.

Deliver only the specified files under output/opsforge/ with valid YAML/CSV content.
